title: PlannerExternalReference
description: An external reference attached to a Planner task

alias.description: A name alias for the reference

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the reference was last modified

previewPriority.description: Hint used to set the relative priority order in which the reference will be shown as a preview on the task

type.description: The type of the reference (e.g., PowerPoint, Word, Excel, Other)
